title: Xiaopeng Humanoid Robot Factory in Guangzhou Begins Trial Production of Small Batches, Expected to Achieve Mass Production by 2026
excerpt: Xiaopeng's humanoid robot has officially started small-scale trial production at its Guangzhou factory. The mass production line is now in the final integration
content_html:
Xiaopeng's humanoid robot has officially started small-scale trial production at its Guangzhou factory. The mass production line is now in the final integration phase, marking the countdown to mass production.

Previously, He Xiaopeng, Chairman and CEO of Xiaopeng Group, had personally taken on the role of "CEO" for the robot business, comprehensively coordinating and advancing the commercialization process of this business. According to the internal mass production mobilization meeting plan for the robot business, the company will achieve mass production of humanoid robots by 2026 and plans to gradually deploy them in Xiaopeng's offline stores and related commercial scenarios starting from 2027, taking on service functions such as guidance and explanation.

In terms of technology and industry reuse, Xiaopeng's robot business has deeply integrated the group's core capabilities in hardware development, AI large models, supply chain management, and marketing, systematically reusing the mature experience accumulated in car business in software and hardware collaborative R&D, intelligent manufacturing, and global channel construction.

As embodied intelligence becomes an important breakthrough for the integration of artificial intelligence and the physical world, Xiaopeng is accelerating the large-scale production and commercialization of high-end humanoid robots through the cross-industry collaboration model of "cars + robots," paving the way for the application of embodied intelligence terminals in service and retail scenarios.

sentences.zh: 小鹏人形机器人已在广州工厂正式开始小规模试生产。

sentences.en: The mass production line is now in the final integration phase, marking the countdown to mass production.
sentences.zh: 目前量产线已进入最后整合阶段，量产已进入倒计时。

blocks.html_en: Previously, He Xiaopeng, Chairman and CEO of Xiaopeng Group, had personally taken on the role of "CEO" for the robot business, comprehensively coordinating and advancing the commercialization process of this business. According to the internal mass production mobilization meeting plan for the robot business, the company will achieve mass production of humanoid robots by 2026 and plans to gradually deploy them in Xiaopeng's offline stores and related commercial scenarios starting from 2027, taking on service functions such as guidance and explanation.

sentences.en: Previously, He Xiaopeng, Chairman and CEO of Xiaopeng Group, had personally taken on the role of "CEO" for the robot business, comprehensively coordinating and advancing the commercialization process of this business.
sentences.zh: 此前，小鹏集团董事长兼首席执行官何小鹏曾亲自担任机器人业务“CEO”，全面统筹推进该业务的商业化进程。

sentences.en: According to the internal mass production mobilization meeting plan for the robot business, the company will achieve mass production of humanoid robots by 2026 and plans to gradually deploy them in Xiaopeng's offline stores and related commercial scenarios starting from 2027, taking on service functions such as guidance and explanation.
sentences.zh: 根据机器人业务内部量产动员会计划，公司将于2026年实现人形机器人量产，并计划从2027年开始逐步部署在小鹏汽车线下门店及相关商业场景，承担引导、讲解等服务功能。

blocks.html_en: In terms of technology and industry reuse, Xiaopeng's robot business has deeply integrated the group's core capabilities in hardware development, AI large models, supply chain management, and marketing, systematically reusing the mature experience accumulated in car business in software and hardware collaborative R&D, intelligent manufacturing, and global channel construction.

sentences.en: In terms of technology and industry reuse, Xiaopeng's robot business has deeply integrated the group's core capabilities in hardware development, AI large models, supply chain management, and marketing, systematically reusing the mature experience accumulated in car business in software and hardware collaborative R&D, intelligent manufacturing, and global channel construction.
sentences.zh: 在技​​术和产业复用方面，小鹏机器人业务深度融合了集团在硬件开发、AI大模型、供应链管理、营销等方面的核心能力，系统地复用了汽车业务在软硬件协同研发、智能制造、全球渠道建设等方面积累的成熟经验。

blocks.html_en: As embodied intelligence becomes an important breakthrough for the integration of artificial intelligence and the physical world, Xiaopeng is accelerating the large-scale production and commercialization of high-end humanoid robots through the cross-industry collaboration model of "cars + robots," paving the way for the application of embodied intelligence terminals in service and retail scenarios.

sentences.en: As embodied intelligence becomes an important breakthrough for the integration of artificial intelligence and the physical world, Xiaopeng is accelerating the large-scale production and commercialization of high-end humanoid robots through the cross-industry collaboration model of "cars + robots," paving the way for the application of embodied intelligence terminals in service and retail scenarios.
sentences.zh: 随着实体智能成为人工智能与物理世界融合的重要突破口，小鹏汽车正通过“汽车+机器人”的跨行业协作模式，加速高端仿人机器人的规模化生产和商业化，为实体智能终端在服务和零售场景的应用铺平道路。

content_html_zh:
小鹏人形机器人已在广州工厂正式开始小规模试生产。 目前量产线已进入最后整合阶段，量产已进入倒计时。

此前，小鹏集团董事长兼首席执行官何小鹏曾亲自担任机器人业务“CEO”，全面统筹推进该业务的商业化进程。 根据机器人业务内部量产动员会计划，公司将于2026年实现人形机器人量产，并计划从2027年开始逐步部署在小鹏汽车线下门店及相关商业场景，承担引导、讲解等服务功能。

在技​​术和产业复用方面，小鹏机器人业务深度融合了集团在硬件开发、AI大模型、供应链管理、营销等方面的核心能力，系统地复用了汽车业务在软硬件协同研发、智能制造、全球渠道建设等方面积累的成熟经验。

随着实体智能成为人工智能与物理世界融合的重要突破口，小鹏汽车正通过“汽车+机器人”的跨行业协作模式，加速高端仿人机器人的规模化生产和商业化，为实体智能终端在服务和零售场景的应用铺平道路。
